title: room.spectator-safe.events
description: Privacy-filtered room event published by Room Gameplay and consumed by Spectator View. See ADR-0014.

roomId.description: Identifier of the room this event belongs to

eventType.description: Type of gameplay event (e.g. card.played, turn.started)

sequenceNumber.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within the room

payload.description: Event-specific data, privacy-filtered — no private hand or deck information
